summary: Fixed the duplicate sc.core.extension_modules install-time write and added a Makefile-driven frontend dev reset entrypoint, but full dev.rebuild.full still fails later on a missing action view external id.

risk.reason: A new independent install-time blocker remains in smart_construction_core action/view references.

next_step: Create a follow-up iteration that fixes smart_construction_core/actions/project_list_actions.xml install-time dependency on smart_construction_core.view_project_my_list_tree.
